winner: I rolled up my shirt to see if it was a roll of quarters, but then I realized I'm not allowed to have shirts made of money.

candidates.text: I tried to roll up my shirt sleeves, but it just gave me a workout—apparently I've been under-training my biceps all this time.

candidates.text: I rolled my eyes so hard I thought I’d lose a shirt, then realized I didn’t own one—just a gym sock and regret.
I rolled a perfect 12,000 on my 401(k), but then I spilled my smoothie on my shirt and ruined it. Life’s got to have balance, man.
I rolled my shirt for laundry day and the dryer ate it—turns out, my sock drawer is now a one-sock business.
